skillBulk.why: the stack skill library the stack-resolution protocol routes to (240+ skills)

namedSkills.note: resolved through the registries when not already present locally

registries.name: awesomeskills
registries.use: discovery: 1000+ skills across coding, design, content, marketing, PM, research

registries.name: crossaitools
registries.use: discovery: 21k+ skills, 12k+ MCP servers, 2.5k+ marketplaces; install via /plugin marketplace add

registries.name: skillsmp
registries.use: discovery: 2M+ skills with a REST API and MCP server; the programmatic backend for /synthesize

registries.name: skillsdirectory
registries.use: trust filter: security-tested skills with A-F grades; prefer high grades, never auto-install ungraded
